name: mina
description: Spec-driven coding workflow plugin. Wires Jira → OpenSpec → GSD/Superpowers → code → Jira, with per-change token tracking, model fallback routing, progress aggregation, session/process resume, named checkpoints, and spec-aware code review. Seven auto-triggering skills, twelve commands, a statusline hook with progress and routing warnings, plus a unified .mina/ state layout.
